task_objective: Build a new Ibis-native logical type inference system from scratch.
design_decisions: Use a batched execution model where all logical type checks for a column are aggregated into a single Ibis query.
Order types by specificity (e.g., Email before Categorical) to ensure correct classification.
Handle nulls explicitly within Ibis expressions to avoid unnecessary row filtering.
results: Successfully implemented a modular and efficient logical type inference system. Verified with tests for Categorical, Email, and UUID types. All tests pass with 91% coverage of the new module.
